parameters.command:
set -e

NOW="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"

echo "CRON_SCAN_START"
echo "checked_at=$NOW"

# Generic scan points; adjust to wherever you log cron output.
for f in /root/.openclaw/workspace/logs/*.log /var/log/syslog /var/log/cron*; do
  [ -e "$f" ] || continue
  echo "FILE_START $f"
  tail -n 200 "$f" 2>/dev/null || true
done
